name: Pie Fillings
recipeIngredient: Clear Jel (tm), chemically modified corn starch, used for sauce consistency
Various fruits such as cherries and blueberries (unsweetened preferred)
recipeInstructions:
1. Select unsweetened frozen fruit if sugar has been added; rinse off any excess sugar.
2. Thaw the fruit and measure juice from the fruit to partially replace water in the recipe.
3. Use 1/4 cup Clear Jel (tm) per quart of filling, or 1-3/4 cups for 7 quarts.
4. Prepare a single quart of pie using fresh apple and peach fillings.
5. Serve and adjust sugar and spices to personal preference; do not alter lemon juice amount as it helps maintain safety and storage stability.
6. Refer to USDA Agriculture Information Bulletin No. 539 (rev. 1994) for additional guidance.
